title: aganosma marginata
intro: Aganosma marginata, also known as the Indian snake root, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aganosma marginata include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
